title: As gas prices soar, Europe faces threat of an energy shock
subhead: The war in the Middle East risks triggering a global battle for gas, sending European prices skyrocketing in recent days. Several liquefied natural gas tankers have rerouted to deliver their cargoes to Asia.

title: Netanyahu vows to carry on war, 'eradicate Iranian regime'
subhead: Israeli leader Benjamin Netanyahu said that thanks to the bombing campaign by Israeli and American pilots, 'We have gained almost complete control of the airspace' over Iran's capital. Speaking to the Iranian people, he said the 'moment of truth' was coming as Israel was seeking to help liberate them from the 'yoke of tyranny.'

title: Kuwait airport, Saudi Arabia targeted as Iran presses Gulf attacks
subhead: Fuel tanks at Kuwait's international airport were targeted in a drone attack, the country's military said, calling the strike 'a direct targeting of vital infrastructure.' Saudi Arabia's defense ministry said Sunday it had intercepted and destroyed 15 drones that entered the kingdom's airspace, including six east of the capital Riyadh.

title: Cultural heritage under threat from Middle East war
subhead: Several sites, including Tehran's Golestan Palace and Tel Aviv's Bauhaus buildings, have sustained damaged from missile strikes.

title: War in Iran: The uncertain aftermath of US and Israeli military dominance
subhead: One week after the launch of Operation Epic Fury, Israel and the United States can claim numerous successes, with no major losses. However, they still have not set a clear objective, as the situation in the region grows increasingly chaotic.

Iranian school hit by air strike: Le Monde's investigation confirms many civilian victims, including children
subhead: Videos obtained and analyzed by Le Monde confirmed that the bombing of a school in Minab, Iran, on the first day of joint US-Israeli strikes on the country, caused many civilian victims, including children.
byline: Alexandre Horn,  Asia Balluffier and  Ghazal Golshiri

title: War in Iran: Verified images show scale of Tehran's response and wide range of targets
subhead: Since the Israeli-American airstrikes on Iran on February 28, the Islamic Republic has launched a large-scale retaliation against numerous targets across the Persian Gulf and as far as the Mediterranean. Videos recorded on the ground and satellite images help measure the number and extent of these strikes.

title: War in Iran puts political pressure on both isolationist Vance and interventionist Rubio
subhead: Neither the US vice president nor the secretary of state stands to gain from a show of military force that lacks a clear strategy and runs counter to the MAGA doctrine. The conflict is primarily Donald Trump's, who appears unconcerned about his political legacy.
